scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (orders, customers, settlements, payment_links); legacy ships no writes (capabilities.write is false) and the full Revolut Merchant surface (order create/capture/cancel/refund, customer create/update, webhook management, payout endpoints) is out of scope outside this connector's current declared surface.

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented order creation; not implemented in this bundle
legacy connector never implemented order capture; not implemented in this bundle
order cancellation mutation; legacy never implemented writes
order refund mutation; legacy never implemented writes
legacy connector never implemented customer create/update; not implemented in this bundle
webhook management not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
payout endpoints not modeled by legacy; not implemented in this bundle
